title: Claude Code v2.1.143
summary: Plugin dependency enforcement (disable/enable with dependency-chain hints), projected context cost in /plugin marketplace, worktree.bgIsolation:none setting, PowerShell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass default, background session model/effort persistence.

title: Cline CLI v3.0.4
summary: Improves light theme TUI colors (chat, status bar, syntax highlighting contrast); fixes plugin tools failing in production npm builds by bundling SDK dependency plugins at runtime.

title: OpenAI Codex rust-v0.131.0-alpha.22
summary: Latest alpha in high-velocity daily shipping cadence of the Rust-based Codex CLI. alpha.21 (May 15) and alpha.22 (May 16 00:21Z) both shipped within 24h window.

title: Salesforce CEO Benioff: $300M Anthropic token spend expected in 2026
summary: Marc Benioff on All-In podcast: Salesforce expects to spend ~$300M on Anthropic Claude tokens in 2026 for coding and product work; plans to add Claude coding integration inside Slack.

title: Anthropic Pushes Deeper Into Legal Work With Claude Updates
summary: Anthropic unveiled 12 new AI plugins for specific legal practice areas including corporate, regulatory, and employment law, deepening Claude's legal vertical offering.

title: SurePath AI: Real-Time MCP Policy Controls to Govern AI Actions
summary: SurePath AI launches enterprise real-time MCP policy controls for audit, compliance, and governance of AI agent actions — first enterprise tooling specifically targeting MCP oversight.

title: Anthropic: 2028 — Two Scenarios for Global AI Leadership
summary: Anthropic paper predicting AGI by 2028; presents two US-China AI scenarios; urges US export controls on chips and restriction of frontier model access to limit China's AI capabilities. Recommends maintaining 12-24 month frontier lead.

title: Anthropic Valuation Approaching $1T — Key for Alphabet
summary: Anthropic raising ~$30B at ~$950B valuation; Alphabet's stake increasingly central to its AI strategy as valuation approaches $1T.

title: Anthropic + Gates Foundation: $200M Partnership for Global Health, Education, Agriculture
summary: Anthropic commits $200M in grant funding, Claude usage credits, and technical support over 4 years; focus areas include global health (polio/HPV/eclampsia), K-12 education tutoring, and agricultural AI tools.

title: PwC + Anthropic Enterprise Expansion: Claude Code + Cowork for 100K+ workforce
summary: PwC deploying Claude Code + Cowork to 100k+ global workforce; joint Center of Excellence; 30,000 PwC professionals to be trained on Claude; Claude to power deal execution and client advisory functions.

title: Cursor 3.3: Build in Parallel, PR Split, Quick-Action Pills
summary: Cursor 3.3 (May 7): parallel agents for independent plan steps, split changes into multiple PRs, pin most-used skills as quick-action pills. May 11: Bugbot moves to usage-based billing.
